description: Create 8 onboarding exploration tasks in new ccb_onboarding suite. Agent simulates a new engineer exploring an unfamiliar codebase, answering structured orientation questions. Analysis only. Weighted checklist scoring.

userStories.title: Create onboard-orient-001: Cilium codebase orientation
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want an onboarding task where the agent explores cilium/cilium and answers 5-7 orientation questions: main entry point, core packages and responsibilities, config loading, test structure, how to add a new network policy type.
acceptanceCriteria: benchmarks/ccb_onboarding/onboard-orient-001/ has complete task files (task.toml, instruction.md, environment/Dockerfile, tests/test.sh, tests/ground_truth.json)
task.toml has category=codebase_orientation, language=go, difficulty=hard, time_limit_sec=1200
instruction.md poses 5-7 specific onboarding questions without any hints about file locations
ground_truth.json has per-question findings with regex patterns for key concepts/files
Task registered in configs/selected_benchmark_tasks.json and onboarding_2config.sh
userStories.notes: Cilium: cmd/cilium-agent/main.go entry, pkg/datapath/ for eBPF, pkg/policy/ for network policies, pkg/k8s/ for K8s integration. Use Sourcegraph to verify structure.

userStories.title: Create onboard-orient-002: Argo CD codebase orientation
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want an onboarding task for argoproj/argo-cd. Questions: entry point, core components (application controller, repo server, API server), configuration, testing patterns, how to add a new sync strategy.
acceptanceCriteria: 5-7 questions covering architecture, components, testing, extension patterns
userStories.notes: Argo CD: cmd/argocd-server/, controller/, reposerver/, util/. Well-structured but requires understanding 3 main binaries. Used v2.13.2 stable release.

userStories.title: Create onboard-orient-003: Kafka codebase orientation
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want an onboarding task for apache/kafka (Java). Questions: build system, module structure, how a topic is created end-to-end, test framework, how to add a new broker config.
userStories.notes: Kafka uses Gradle, has core/, clients/, server/, streams/ modules. Build system is non-trivial (Gradle + custom plugins).

userStories.title: Create onboard-handoff-001: Envoy ext_authz filter team handoff
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a task simulating receiving ownership of Envoy's ext_authz filter. Agent must produce a team handoff document covering: purpose, upstream/downstream deps, key files, failure modes, how to test, how to debug.
acceptanceCriteria: instruction.md presents the scenario: 'You are taking over the ext_authz filter from a departing team member'
ground_truth.json has required sections (purpose, dependencies, key_files, failure_modes, testing, debugging) with weighted findings per section
userStories.notes: Envoy ext_authz: source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/. Depends on: grpc, http filter chain, cluster manager. MCP find_references reveals downstream consumers.

userStories.title: Create onboard-handoff-002: Terraform state backend team handoff
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a handoff task for Terraform's state backend subsystem. Agent must document the state backend's purpose, supported backends, how state locking works, failure modes, extension points.
acceptanceCriteria: Handoff doc covers: purpose, backend types, locking mechanism, failure modes, how to add a new backend
userStories.notes: Terraform: internal/backend/, internal/states/. Backend interface, state locking via statemgr.Locker. Created using v1.9.0 stable release. Ground truth covers 7 sections: purpose, dependencies, key_files, failure_modes, testing, debugging, adding new backend.

userStories.title: Create onboard-handoff-003: Cilium eBPF datapath team handoff
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a handoff task for Cilium's eBPF datapath subsystem covering: what it does, how eBPF programs are loaded, how policy is enforced, monitoring/debugging, how to add a new hook.
acceptanceCriteria: ground_truth.json per-section findings covering eBPF loader, policy enforcement, monitoring
userStories.notes: Cilium eBPF: pkg/datapath/loader/, bpf/ (C programs), pkg/maps/. Complex Go+C boundary.

userStories.title: Create onboard-workflow-001: Envoy contributor workflow discovery
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a task where the agent figures out how to contribute to Envoy — Bazel build system, test framework, CI pipeline, code review process.
acceptanceCriteria: Agent must produce a 'contributor guide' covering: build prerequisites, how to build, how to run tests, CI overview
ground_truth.json has specific correct answers: bazel build commands, test commands, CI file locations
userStories.notes: Envoy uses Bazel, has complex CI (Azure Pipelines + GitHub Actions), test_common/ framework. CONTRIBUTING.md and ci/ directory are key.

userStories.title: Create onboard-workflow-002: Kafka contributor workflow discovery
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a workflow discovery task for Kafka's Gradle-based build system, test framework, and CI pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: ground_truth.json has correct Gradle build commands, test runner info, CI locations
userStories.notes: Kafka: ./gradlew build, ./gradlew test, Jenkins CI. Non-trivial multi-module Gradle project.
